markets.rules_secondary: The Contract will expire at the sooner of the first 9:00 AM following the release of the data for March 08, 2026, or one week after March 08, 2026. The Last Trading Date and Time will always be 11:59 PM on March 08, 2026.
markets.subtitle: 1.8 million
markets.title: Will more than 1800000 people be **screened by the TSA** on average this week?
markets.yes_sub_title: Above 1.8 million

markets.no_sub_title: Rain in NYC
markets.rules_primary: If the number of inches of precipitation recorded at Central Park, New York on March 03, 2026 is strictly greater than 0, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The Payout Criterion only encompasses Expiration Values that are strictly greater than  inches. If the Expiration Value is T (when the target is 0) for Trace or R for Record (where the record set is strictly greater than ), then the market resolves to Yes.

This market will close and expire the sooner of the first 10:00 AM ET following the release of data for March 03, 2026 or March 10, 2026.

If the Climatological Report is still inconclusive on March 10, 2026, Kalshi will reference the columns titled "Weather" and "1 Hour Precip (in)" in the NWS time series (https://www.weather.gov/wrh/timeseries?site=knyc) for determination via rule 7.2 of the rulebook.
markets.title: Will it **rain** in New York City on Tuesday?
markets.yes_sub_title: Rain in NYC

markets.no_sub_title: Nikola Vučević
markets.rules_primary: If Nikola Vučević records a Double Double in the Boston at Milwaukee professional basketball game originally scheduled for Mar 2, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: Statistics are considered final at the conclusion of the specified time period of the basketball game. Statistics that count towards a double double include points, rebounds, assists, blocks, and steals. Any combination of 10+ in 2 or more of these statistics results in a double double. Corrections made after the game ends will not affect resolution. Statistics recorded during both regulation time and overtime count unless the time period specifies otherwise (e.g., "regulation only"). If the game is cancelled before starting, markets resolve to last fair price. If cancelled after starting and not resumed within 24 hours, markets resolve to last fair price except for thresholds already reached. If an entity (player or team) withdraws before the game, markets on that entity resolve to last fair price. If a player is injured, retires, or is disqualified during the game after playing at least one second, markets settle based on end-of-game statistics.
markets.title: Nikola Vučević: Double Double
